reach_why: Mostly extends known critiques of language-centric AI and self-improvement, not a wholly new explanatory domain.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links ontology change, mathematical discovery, and evaluator bugs into one failure mode.
falsifiable_why: Test by comparing language-heavy self-improvers against systems with mathematical and ontology-revising capacities.
explanation: Fluent self-praise can mask stalled discovery when real progress needs mathematics and changing conceptual primitives.
